overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a dark forest village at night. The character moves along a dirt path past wooden huts with burning fires, surrounded by dense pine trees and stone walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested village path with stone walls

events.description: character turns slightly left to follow the curving dirt path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking away from a wooden hut along a dirt path bordered by stone walls, heading deeper into the forested settlement

entered.detail: small wooden hut with a burning fire outside, illuminating the immediate area with orange light
low stone wall running parallel to the dirt path
tall pine trees surrounding the path, creating a dense forest canopy

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt standing near a wooden hut with a burning fire, then walking along a narrow dirt path. A stone wall runs along the left side while dense forest surrounds the area. The night scene is dimly lit with the character moving away from the initial hut.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested path approaching a riverside hut

events.description: small stream becomes visible on the left side of the path
approaching a second wooden hut with an outdoor fire on the right

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues along the forest path, navigating toward a second wooden hut situated near a small stream

entered.detail: wooden hut with a burning fire outside, located near the stream
narrow waterway running alongside the dirt path

segments.scene_description: As Geralt progresses along the path, the initial hut and stone wall fall behind, and a small stream appears on the left. The character approaches a second wooden hut with a burning fire, navigating the narrow forest trail as the environment transitions to a riverside setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit forest village that shifts from a confined path beside a stone wall to an open riverside setting. It begins with Geralt standing near a wooden hut with a burning fire before he sets off along a narrow dirt path. As he moves away from the initial dwelling, the stone wall on the left recedes into the dense surrounding forest. The scene then opens up as a small stream appears on the left, guiding the character further along the trail. Finally, the path leads toward a second wooden hut with a burning fire, completing the transition into the riverside environment.
